description:
Design a Zener diode voltage regulator circuit using the Electrical Engineering Calculations app. You need to power a 3.3V microcontroller module from a 9V battery. The module draws a load current of 20 mA, and the 3.3V Zener diode requires a minimum bias current of 5 mA. Calculate the required series resistor value and its power dissipation. Save the results to /sdcard/tasks/zener_design/result.txt in the following format:
Resistor: [Value] Ohms
Power: [Value] mW
